headline: AMD AI Deal Talks With Upstage Highlight Valuation Gap And Growth Story
summary: AMD, ticker NasdaqGS:AMD, is in advanced talks to supply around 10,000 MI355 AI accelerators to South Korean AI company Upstage. The potential deal would support South Korea's national AI infrastructure and reduce reliance on a single supplier. This agreement would mark a meaningful AI hardware win for AMD outside the US and expand its international presence in the AI accelerator market. The news follows recent engagement by AMD CEO Lisa Su with Korean tech leaders. For you as an investor...
